input: Customer says someone changed their password overnight and they cannot sign in. They report unfamiliar recovery email and ask to lock the account immediately.
Customer asks why the invoice total increased after adding five seats and wants a breakdown before paying.
Customer reports the export button returns a 500 error for every project since the latest release and includes request id req-7781.
Customer asks how to reset their notification preferences and says they are not blocked from using the product.
Customer demands deletion of all personal data under GDPR and asks for confirmation of retention timelines.
Customer is angry because production checkout has been down for twenty minutes after API calls started timing out.
Customer asks whether the product can add dark mode to the admin console next quarter.
Customer pastes a suspicious email asking them to install a remote access tool and asks if it is legitimate.
